ConstructorArguments: Adjust how quickly the cubemap blurs out at closer distances. A value of 0.0 always uses the lowest resolution MIP over the entire range, while a value of 1.0 uses the highest.

ConstructorArguments: The distance between the start of the height fog and where it is fully opaque. Setting this to 0 will disable height based blending.
